properties.status_notes: Light rail service will continue detouring via the Allentown tracks on Warrington and New Arlington Avenues due to ongoing tunnel repairs. Additionally a Subway Local rail car will be available between Station Square and destinations in the Downtown area for free transfer to and from Red, Silver & Blue Line cars.
